subject: [PATCH 5/9] sched/rt: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's real-time scheduling code to defer warning messages under rq->lock or ->pi_lock using SCHED_WARN*() variants instead of WARN*(). This change prevents potential deadlocks caused by synchronous console output while holding these locks. The patch replaces 17 instances of WARN_ON_ONCE and WARN_ON with their deferred counterparts, ensuring that warnings are emitted asynchronously via irq_work.
